<!-- What this change does and why. One paragraph. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] docs
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] test
- [ ] ci
- [ ] chore

## Related issues

<!-- Closes #123, Refs #456. Leave blank if none. -->

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Architectural decisions, trade-offs, intentional weirdness, known
limitations, deferred work. Anything that might look wrong but is on
purpose, or anything you want extra eyes on. Leave blank if the diff
speaks for itself. -->

## Test plan

- [ ] Unit tests cover the changed logic.
- [ ] Integration tests cover any driver-touching paths.
- [ ] Manual verification steps documented below, if applicable.

<!-- Manual steps, if any. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] DCO sign-off present on every commit (`git commit -s`).
- [ ] Tests added or updated.
- [ ] `npm run lint`, `npm run build`, and `npm test` pass locally.
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits format.
- [ ] Breaking changes documented in the commit body with `BREAKING CHANGE:` footer, if applicable.
